acquisition method: Experiments were done in DDA mode with top 15 precursor ions isolated
alkylation reagent: alkylation was carried out with iodoacetamide (Sigma)
alkylation concentration: at a final concentration of 40 mM
cleavage agent: Sequencing grade trypsin was added to a final amount of 1:50 (trypsin: total protein)
collision energy: Normalized collision energy was applied to fragment precursors at energies of 30%
enrichment method: biotinylated peptides were enriched using our previously published protocol which employs bead-immobilized anti-biotin antibodies
instrument: samples enriched for biotinylated peptides were analyzed by Orbitrap Exploris 480 mass spectrometer
reduction concentration: at a final concentration of 10 mM for 45 min
